safeClaims: GCA is a fixed-supply ERC-20 token on Base Mainnet.

GCA remains concept-stage with live account intake, read-only wallet verification, eligible ledger records, ten browser-only risk and research tools, and a local Member Workspace; connected market-data and trading modules remain staged.
The GCA Risk Passport reports validated browser-local workflow counts and statuses only; it excludes identity, wallet address, balances, and tool content and is not a certification or trading signal.

The GCA Workspace Vault encrypts validated tool backups locally, validates every module before restore, excludes the member-access wallet snapshot and full service-request packet, and never uploads the file or passphrase.
The public member access page can create account intake, wallet verification, 100 credits ledger, and GCA Member ledger records for eligible users.
The GCA Member benefit requires 1,000,000 GCA held for 30 consecutive days before one-time 10,000 GCA review.
The official market route is GCA/USDT on Base Mainnet.
Owner reported on 2026-05-14 that no wallet risk warning was visible in the tested wallet/DEX flow.
doNotClaim: the 10,000 GCA member benefit is automatic or self-service transferred before holding-period verification, support approval, and manual reserve-wallet processing
BaseScan token profile approval before BaseScan publishes it
security-vendor approval, permanent warning-free status, or cross-wallet warning removal before vendor/current wallet UI confirms it
third-party audit completion before an independent report is published
deep liquidity, price support, or trading outcomes
